description_long: This rifle features a long, slender barrel with a striking multicolored finish, including white, yellow, green, and black accents, and a detailed graphic design along the stock and receiver. The stock is fixed and has a contoured cheek rest, with a visible buttpad and a forest-themed motif. The receiver area is equipped with a rail for mounting optics, though no scope or advanced sight is attached, and the rifle appears to use a traditional iron sight system. The grip is ergonomically shaped and colored with a green camo pattern, blending into the wooden section of the stock. The barrel is long and unadorned, with no visible muzzle device, and the magazine is internal, not protruding from the rifle. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials, with a robust and durable build suitable for urban or sporting use.
description: A long, multicolored rifle with a fixed stock, ergonomic grip, and detailed graphic design, featuring iron sights and an internal magazine. The barrel is unadorned and the stock displays a forest motif.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel end and the colorful muzzle, with the rifle's symmetry and slim profile most apparent.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the rifle, the detailed forest-themed stock, ergonomic grip, and the rail on top of the receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the buttpad, cheek rest, and the alignment of the stock and barrel, with the grip and trigger area visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the same graphic details as the left, with the internal magazine and iron sights visible, and the full length of the barrel.
